subcodes.first_line: O son of the martyr! Thy detailed letter, in all its spirit, fragrance and care, was attentively perused. Its reading brought great joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن الشهید نامه مفصل بنهایت روح و ریحان و دقت ملاحظه گردید از قرائتش بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @personal instructions, @eulogies; reminiscences
